summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. 查爾斯·施瓦布計劃進入預測市場，與Cboe推出基於事件的標普500選擇權。
2. 比特幣期權到期迫在眉睫，市場將面臨挑戰，尤其在牛市情緒下。
3. 安德魯·泰特在比特幣交易中損失近86,000美元，顯示市場風險。
4. 加密市場整體市值為2.26兆美元，BTC市佔率為56.11%。
5. 恐懼貪婪指數顯示市場情緒極度恐懼，為14。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場仍然呈現整體下行趨勢。比特幣（BTC）目前價格為$63,197，24小時漲幅為0.67%。以太坊（ETH）則小幅上漲至$1,706.12，而Solana（SOL）則略有回落至$69.17。BNB和XRP則展現相對疲軟的情況，特別是BNB，顯示出空頭信號。整體市場情緒受到恐懼貪婪指數的影響，顯示投資者信心不足。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
根據今日的技術指標，比特幣的RSI為34.02，顯示出市場正處於超賣區域，可能出現反彈的機會。以太坊的RSI為37.65，雖然也是偏低，但仍有上漲潛力。Solana的RSI為40.14，顯示出相對強勁的支撐。值得注意的是，BNB的均線信號為空頭，暗示短期內可能會有進一步的下行壓力。

## 😱 市場情緒
今日的恐懼貪婪指數為14，顯示出極度恐懼的市場情緒。投資者普遍對未來的市場走勢感到不安，尤其是在比特幣期權到期前夕。社群情緒也顯示出對市場反彈的懷疑，這可能會進一步壓制市場的回升動力。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
考慮到當前市場的極度恐懼情緒，以及即將到期的比特幣期權，投資者需謹慎操作。市場波動性可能會加劇，尤其是在負面消息面前。建議投資者密切關注技術指標和基本面變化，避免過度追高或盲目跟風。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
投資者應關注比特幣期權到期後的市場反應，特別是對於牛市情緒的影響。此外，施瓦布進入預測市場的動向也值得密切關注，因為這可能會對傳統市場和加密市場的整體情緒產生影響。注意技術指標的變化，尋找可能的進場時機。

news.title: Charles Schwab to enter prediction markets with S&P 500 wagers: WSJ
news.summary: The offering from the financial services company will reportedly only include yes-or-no bets on whether the S&P 500 closes above or below a target price.
news.title_zh: 查爾斯·施瓦布將進入預測市場，並對標普500進行投注：華爾街日報
news.summary_zh: 查爾斯·施瓦布計劃透過標普500的投注進入預測市場，顯示其對市場動態的興趣。

news.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
news.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
news.title_zh: 今天加密貨幣市場發生了什麼

news.title: $13B Bitcoin options expiry looms: Will bulls endure more pain in June?
news.summary: Bitcoin bears hold the upper hand in the upcoming Bitcoin options expiry, a potentially early warning that more BTC downside could unfold.

news.summary: The Austrian authorization gives WhiteBIT access to the EU's unified crypto framework, which will require exchanges to hold MiCA licenses or stop serving clients after July 1.

news.summary_zh: WhiteBIT成功獲得奧地利的MiCA許可，為其在歐盟的業務擴展鋪平道路。

news.title: House Republican Introduces Insider Trading Bill to Ban Lawmaker Prediction Market Bets
news.summary: The bill is meant to curb potential insider trading, blocking lawmakers and family members from policy-related prediction market bets.

news.title: Republican lawmaker proposes prediction markets insider trading ban, not including White House officials
news.summary: The bill did not specifically bar members of the US Congress from using the platforms or making sports bets, but prohibited policy wagers.
news.title_zh: 共和黨立法者提議禁止預測市場內幕交易，但不包括白宮官員
news.summary_zh: 該提議針對預測市場內幕交易，但特別排除了白宮官員的相關規範。

news.title: GPT-5.6 Rumors Heat Up as Users Swear ChatGPT Suddenly Got Smarter

news.summary: Isiah and Raymond Garcia held a Minnesota family at gunpoint for eight hours and forced the father to transfer over $8 million in crypto.

news.title: What Is the CLARITY Act? The Crypto Market Structure Bill Explained
news.summary: The CLARITY Act, formally the Digital Asset Market Clarity Act, is a proposed U.S. cryptocurrency market structure bill that would establish a federal framework for how digital assets are issued, traded and regulated in the United States. The bill focuses on digital asset regulation, including how crypto firms should comply with federal law and which regulators […]
news.title_zh: CLARITY法案是什麼？加密市場結構法案解釋
news.summary_zh: CLARITY法案旨在為加密市場建立清晰的結構和規範，以促進行業的健康發展。

news.title: What Happens When Bitcoin Reaches 21 Million Supply?
news.summary: Bitcoin has a maximum supply of 21 million coins, a limit written into the network’s code by its creator, Satoshi Nakamoto. Once all 21 million bitcoin have been mined, no new bitcoin will ever be created. Regardless, the network is expected to keep operating much the same as it does today. Instead of mining newly […]

news.summary_zh: 探討比特幣供應量達到2100萬後可能對市場和投資者的影響。

news.title: Franklin Templeton files ETFs that turn stock dividends into Bitcoin exposure
news.summary: The proposed funds would allocate stock dividends to Bitcoin-linked investments, using a dividend reinvestment strategy to build crypto exposure over time.

news.title: Microsoft warns users of 'Crypto Clipper' malware spread via USB drives

news.title: CFTC, SEC request public comment to clarify definition of ‘swaps’ amid CME lawsuit
news.summary: CME Group sued the CFTC on Thursday over the agency's decision to classify perpetual futures as futures contracts rather than swaps.
news.title_zh: CFTC和SEC要求公眾意見以澄清‘交換’的定義，因CME訴訟而起
news.summary_zh: CFTC和SEC正在尋求公眾意見，以明確‘交換’的法律定義。

news.title: XRP falls 3% after losing $1.15 support as breakout attempt fades
news.title_zh: XRP在失去1.15美元支撐後下跌3%，突破嘗試失敗
news.summary_zh: XRP因未能突破關鍵支撐位而出現下跌，投資者情緒受到影響。

news.title: Live markets: Bitcoin under pressure as Saylor comments on STRC selloff
news.title_zh: 即時市場：隨著Saylor對STRC拋售的評論，比特幣面臨壓力
news.summary_zh: 比特幣市場受到壓力，因Saylor對STRC的拋售發表評論。

news.title: Bitcoin traders load up on bearish bets all the way down to $52,000
news.title_zh: 比特幣交易者在價格下滑至52000美元時加碼看空押注
news.summary_zh: 隨著比特幣價格下跌，交易者增加對未來走勢的看空押注。

news.title: Bitcoin falls below $63,000 as risk assets sell off and the week's bounce fades
news.title_zh: 比特幣跌破63000美元，風險資產拋售，周內反彈消退
news.summary_zh: 比特幣因市場風險資產拋售而跌破63000美元，反彈趨勢消退。

news.title: US crypto ETFs are pulling Bitcoiners into TradFi: BlackRock's Jay Jacobs
news.summary: The merger of crypto, decentralized finance and traditional finance is being referred to as the “Great Convergence” at BlackRock.
news.title_zh: 美國加密ETF吸引比特幣投資者進入傳統金融：黑石的Jay Jacobs
news.summary_zh: 黑石的Jay Jacobs指出，加密ETF正在將比特幣投資者吸引至傳統金融市場。

news.title: Kalshi holds early IPO talks with investment banks: report
news.summary: The prediction markets platform raised $1 billion in a Series F round in May, bringing its valuation to $22 billion.
news.title_zh: Kalshi 與投資銀行進行早期 IPO 會談：報導
news.summary_zh: Kalshi 正在與投資銀行進行初步的 IPO 會談，計劃未來上市。

news.title: Morgan Stanley files amendments for ETH and SOL ETFs, revealing lowest fees in market
news.summary: The disclosure of additional amendments typically reflects active communication with the SEC and progress in the launch process.
news.title_zh: 摩根士丹利提交 ETH 和 SOL ETF 的修正案，揭示市場最低費用
news.summary_zh: 摩根士丹利針對以太坊和索拉納 ETF 提交修正案，並公布市場上最低的管理費用。

news.title: Celsius’ Mashinsky gets permanent trading ban in CFTC settlement
news.summary: The US commodities watchdog has settled with Celsius founder Alex Mashinsky, ending the agency’s first-ever case against a crypto lending platform.
news.title_zh: Celsius 的 Mashinsky 在 CFTC 和解中獲得永久交易禁令
news.summary_zh: Celsius 的創始人 Mashinsky 在與 CFTC 的和解中被禁止進行交易，影響其未來業務。

news.title: Fidelity launches GENIUS-aligned money market fund for stablecoin issuers
news.summary: The fund invests exclusively in eligible reserve assets permitted for stablecoin issuers under the GENIUS Act.
news.title_zh: 富達推出與 GENIUS 對齊的貨幣市場基金，專為穩定幣發行者設計
news.summary_zh: 富達推出新貨幣市場基金，旨在支持穩定幣發行者，促進市場流動性。

news.title: Ether analysts predict another ‘selling wave’ as ETH struggles to overcome $1.7K
news.summary: Exchange inflows, slumping demand and a 31% drop in Ether futures open interest may signal that another wave of selling could hit ETH.
news.title_zh: 以太坊分析師預測 ETH 將面臨另一波拋售，因價格難以突破 1.7K 美元
news.summary_zh: 分析師預測以太坊將面臨新的拋售壓力，因其價格在 1.7K 美元附近掙扎。
